headline: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.4, a groundbreaking model with 1M-token context and advanced capabilities.

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
items.summary: OpenAI has announced GPT-5.4, its latest large language model designed for professional work. This model features state-of-the-art coding support, a 1 million token context window, and enhanced capabilities in tool use and search. It is optimized for efficiency and performance, positioning itself as OpenAI’s most advanced offering to date.
items.why_it_matters: This release sets a new standard for LLM capabilities, directly impacting developers building advanced AI applications.

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: OpenAI has released Codex Security in research preview. This AI tool is designed to enhance application security by analyzing project context to detect, validate, and patch vulnerabilities with higher accuracy and reduced false positives.
items.why_it_matters: Improving security workflows will be crucial for developers integrating AI into their software systems.

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: Balyasny Asset Management has developed a robust AI research engine leveraging GPT-5.4, which includes rigorous model evaluation and agent workflows to enhance investment analysis scalability and accuracy.
items.why_it_matters: It demonstrates practical applications of advanced AI models in transforming traditional industries.

items.title: Building custom model provider for Strands Agents with LLMs hosted on SageMaker AI endpoints
items.summary: AWS demonstrates how to build custom model parsers for Strands agents with LLMs hosted on SageMaker. The process includes deploying models like Llama 3.1 using AWS tools and integrating with non-native APIs.

items.title: Drive organizational growth with Amazon Lex multi-developer CI/CD pipeline
items.summary: Amazon introduces a CI/CD pipeline for Lex, supporting multi-developer environments with automated testing and deployment capabilities, enhancing development efficiency and collaboration.

items.title: Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
items.summary: OpenAI's introduction of CoT-Control reveals that current reasoning models have challenges controlling their thought processes effectively, highlighting monitorability as a critical AI safety feature.

items.title: 60 million Copilot code reviews and counting
items.summary: GitHub highlights the impact of Copilot's code review feature, which has processed 60 million code reviews, assisting developers in managing AI-accelerated code changes effectively.
items.source: The latest on AI & ML - The GitHub Blog

all_items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
all_items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

all_items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
all_items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.

all_items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.

all_items.summary: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.

all_items.title: Drive organizational growth with Amazon Lex multi-developer CI/CD pipeline
all_items.summary: In this post, we walk through a multi-developer CI/CD pipeline for Amazon Lex that enables isolated development environments, automated testing, and streamlined deployments. We show you how to set up the solution and share real-world results from teams using this approach.

all_items.title: Building custom model provider for Strands Agents with LLMs hosted on SageMaker AI endpoints
all_items.summary: This post demonstrates how to build custom model parsers for Strands agents when working with LLMs hosted on SageMaker that don't natively support the Bedrock Messages API format. We'll walk through deploying Llama 3.1 with SGLang on SageMaker using awslabs/ml-container-creator, then implementing a custom parser to integrate it with Strands agents.

all_items.summary:

The post How to scan for vulnerabilities with GitHub Security Lab’s open source AI-powered framework appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
